prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to local authorities in England, as public health grants and their governance are devolved matters. In Scotland, public health is managed by the Scottish Government and local health boards, and therefore, this document does not apply to Scotland.
